context: Tests whether HealthKit workout guidance distinguishes session and live-builder availability, sensor behavior, mirroring, and locked-device data access.

checklist.name: Session availability
checklist.description: Distinguishes HKWorkoutSession availability from HKLiveWorkoutBuilder availability.

checklist.name: Live builder availability
checklist.description: States that HKLiveWorkoutBuilder requires iOS/iPadOS 26 or watchOS 5 and should be gated for older iOS/iPadOS targets.

checklist.name: iPhone and iPad heart rate
checklist.description: States that iPhone and iPad need a paired external heart-rate sensor for live heart-rate collection.

checklist.name: Apple Watch heart rate
checklist.description: Mentions that Apple Watch can collect high-frequency heart-rate samples during workouts.

checklist.name: Mirroring setup
checklist.description: For mirroring, starts from the watchOS workout session and assigns workoutSessionMirroringStartHandler early in the iOS app.

checklist.name: Locked-device access
checklist.description: Mentions lock-screen or locked-device workout data access considerations when showing live iPhone metrics.
